name: Gravity Tokenizer — Ablation Leverage Vocabulary Optimization
blurb: Replaces 659/765 merge tokens by ablation leverage scoring (beta=1.0). Vanilla 12L 384d transformer, no architectural novelties. 3-seed mean: 1.0321 (std 0.0011). The vocabulary alone accounts for the entire improvement. No SmearGate, no BigramHash, no XSA, no EMA, no TTT, no sliding window eval.
author: Che Crowley
